description: Template-authored fleet-propagation change feed. Each entry declares one safe-to-propagate change (security or safe-non-visual). The studio classifier reads this at the template HEAD and emits change_records; patch bodies and inverse SQL are authored here and applied verbatim — never synthesized.

changes.summary: Align the two withCache helpers to one argument order (gas-template #63) — internal correctness fix, no UI or visible-behavior change.
